# UWorld-Anki Note-Level Local Source Map

This map is formatted for fast searching in GitHub or browser find. Each entry starts with the cleaned Anki note/card text, then lists UWorld locators plus short question/passage-content phrases you can search inside the local UWorld source files. Explicit UWorld QIDs were not visible in the available sources, so these are local source references rather than QID claims.

## Search Tips

- Search Anki content with `Flashcard:` plus a distinctive phrase from the note.
- Search the UWorld PDF/docx with text under `Find by question/passage content` first.
- Use `Source anchor` when the question wording is generic and the useful clue lives in answer text, a passage excerpt, a table, or a graph.
- Entries are note/concept-level, so redundant Anki cards are collapsed into the clearest searchable note.

### Biology-Homeostasis-0001
